vocab.meaning: sự sáng tạo không giới hạn/không bị kiềm chế
vocab.example: As a child, I used to engage in drawing and building blocks with unbridled creativity, often turning the living room into a fortress.

vocab.meaning: một trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sống động
vocab.example: My favourite activity was role-playing historical battles; I had such a vivid imagination that I could play alone for hours.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/phát triển các kỹ năng xã hội
vocab.example: Playing team sports like football after school really helped foster social skills and taught me the value of cooperation.

vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng/nhớ lại một cách trìu mến
vocab.example: I often reminisce about the long afternoons spent flying kites, which was a quintessential part of my childhood.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi truy tìm kho báu/đồ vật
vocab.example: We used to organize a backyard scavenger hunt every summer, which was definitely the highlight of my holidays.

vocab.meaning: mải mê/say mê vào việc gì đó
vocab.example: I would often be completely engrossed in assembling complex jigsaw puzzles during rainy days.

vocab.meaning: kì quặc nhưng thú vị/đầy tính tưởng tượng
vocab.example: We spent most of our time making whimsical costumes out of old newspapers and cardboard boxes.

vocab.meaning: khám phá thực hành/trải nghiệm thực tế
vocab.example: I had a strong preference for hands-on exploration, such as catching tadpoles in the local pond.
Playing board games with my family holds immense nostalgic value for me, as it was our primary weekend ritual.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển vô lo vô nghĩ
vocab.example: Cycling around the neighborhood was a carefree pastime that allowed us to feel a sense of independence.
